title: Upgrade flask 2.3.3 → 3.1.3 (CVE-2026-27205)
detail: Flask 2.3.3 is vulnerable to CVE-2026-27205. Fix available: upgrade to flask>=3.1.3. File: `requirements/base.txt` line 109. Flask is the core web framework for Superset — this upgrade may involve breaking API changes between 2.x and 3.x.

title: Upgrade pyjwt 2.12.0 → 2.13.0 (PYSEC-2026-179)
detail: PyJWT 2.12.0 has 5 known vulnerabilities (PYSEC-2026-175 through 179). Fix: upgrade to pyjwt>=2.13.0. File: `requirements/base.txt` line 318. PyJWT is used for authentication token handling throughout Superset.

title: Upgrade paramiko 3.5.1 → unknown (CVE-2026-44405)
detail: Paramiko 3.5.1 is vulnerable to CVE-2026-44405. Note: paramiko is already capped <4.0 per recent commit 74845eaf0b. File: `requirements/base.txt` line 277. Used for SSH tunneling to databases.

title: Upgrade esbuild (GHSA-gv7w-rqvm-qjhr)
detail: esbuild 0.17.0–0.28.0 is missing binary integrity verification, enabling remote code execution via NPM_CONFIG_REGISTRY. Affects storybook and tsx. Fix requires upgrading storybook to >=8.7.0. This is a dev dependency only — does not affect production builds.

title: Upgrade joi (GHSA-q7cg-457f-vx79)
detail: joi (via jest-process-manager) has an uncaught RangeError on deeply nested input through recursive link() schemas. Fix: `npm audit fix` or upgrade jest-process-manager. Dev dependency only — affects test infrastructure.

title: Narrow broad except in `core.py` L237
detail:
```python
except Exception as ex:  # pylint: disable=broad-except
```
Replace broad `except Exception` with specific exception type(s).
